violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The front service area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC to install hand sink in the front. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

Raw animal foods (hamburger) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked chicken). Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

A large plastic tub of ground beef was used for food preparation in the morning. Large tub was placed back in walk-in in a large covered plastic container. Beef was approximately 50 degrees placed in unit over one hour ago. Food was relocated to sheet pans. Proper cooling methods discussed with PIC. Moving forward PIC stated ground beef will be placed in a separate container to portion in the prep area and bulk container will stay in walk-in. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The floor in the basement area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Area to be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The front service area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC to install hand sink in the front. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

Raw animal foods (hamburger) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked chicken). Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Ground beef was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

A large plastic tub of ground beef was used for food preparation in the morning. Large tub was placed back in walk-in in a large covered plastic container. Beef was approximately 52 degrees placed in unit over one hour ago. Food was relocated to sheet pans. Proper cooling methods discussed with PIC moving forward. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by approximately ten dead rodents, an accumulation of droppings, and live activity observed. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Utensils in the are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Boxes of containers were observed stored on the floor in the basement area. Containers to be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

A large accumulation was observed in the basement area. A small accumulation of rodent droppings were observed behind the cookline equipment. Area to be thoroughly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap made available at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels made available at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The front service area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Per the PIC, a hand sink is on order for installation. PIC to install hand sink in the front. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Per the PIC, door self-closing hinge on order to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. PIC to enroll at least one more employee in a food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The front service area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC to install hand sink in the front. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Boxes were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Raw animal foods (hamburger) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Inspector demonstrated how to set up 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Beef, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Beef from yesterday was observed at 52 degrees. Beef was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Beef was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Food was disposed of. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Empanadas were observed being prepped on a garbage can. PIC relocated empanadas. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The faucet for the 3-bay sink was observed with a leak/tape. Faucet to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The facility is lacking stoppers for 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The 3-bay sink was observed without adequate stoppers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
